programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite platforms suspended in the air. Contestants will be locked in a cage and hung from a crane. Contestant will have to siphon fluid out of containers and into a funnel. A contestant will cross a beam above ground.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Poles will be attached and hung off the dump truck off the ground. Plexiglas box is buried in the sand and filled with water and sand. Contestants will be standing on a car that is suspended over the water by a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on top of a platform that covers a water tank. A blindfolded contestant is guided by their partner's verbal commands to a tank filled with leeches. Contestants will be standing a tube that is suspended in the air from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing on the platform that is suspended. Contestants will lick bugs off of ropes. A glass tube is suspended vertically from a crane with the top sealed and the bottom open and submerges in a pool.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be in a dingy that is being towed by a net attached to the back end of the schooner. Contestants will be standing on a plank above the water. Contestants have Thanksgiving dinner. Contestant will start on a platform above the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be bound to a chair, that will be suspend over the water. Dressed in a dog bite protection suit, contestants must climb out of a specially designed chimney and into an enclosed room. Contestant must drive their car towards a pipe ramp.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are standing on top of one of two semi trucks traveling. Contestants will play a game to determine how many disgusting donuts they will have to eat. Contestants will be standing on a truss structure that is above the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this head to head couples stunt the male contestants will be hung by their ankles under individual helicopters. Each team will be in their own massive trough filled with fish guts, squid, and fish scales.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt the contestants will be standing at a podium on the roof of a 5 story building. The first contestant loads a piece of cow stomach onto a catapult, which will launch the stomach down range to their partner

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this head to head couples stunt, each team is seated in the front of their own car. Male contestants head is placed through a hole cut into the bottom of a slightly angled plexi-sewer pipe, his arms are shackled around the outside of the pipe.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this stunt one of the contestants will be seated on a platform above the water wearing weighted boots. Laying face down on the floor, contestants' heads are placed in separate medieval looking helmets, filled with snakes and rats.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will each be standing on the back of a flatbed truck driving down the edge of a pier. Contestant must guide their blindfolded partner through a maze of electrical tripwires.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt, each contestant will be standing on a beam that is suspended in the air off the sides of a train box car. In a banquet room, couples will feed each other as much disgusting food as they can.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Both contestants in the finals will be riding on the back of an Ultraboat as a helicopter settles in overhead. Male contestant is placed in a bamboo cage filled with large bullfrogs, which is then lowered into a pit.

programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage…and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin, and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: Delta Force 2: The Colombian Connection
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is in peak form in this explosive action/adventure that brings back one of his most unforgettable characters, Delta Force Colonel Scott McCoy, for a daring mission to destroy a deadly drug cartel led by the ruthless Billy Drago!

programme.title: Lone Wolf McQuade
programme.desc: A maverick Texas Ranger throws down his guns to indulge his talents in the martial arts when he meets his match in the leader of a gun-smuggling ring.

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is back in this action-packed martial arts showcase co-starring the legendary Lee Van Cleef. Norris takes on his adoptive brother and a training camp where terrorists are being taught the secret killing techniques of the ninja!

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: When one of the US Air Force’s most modern tactical aircraft crashes in the sea near Malta, the CIA dispatches their best agent to salvage the plane's advanced weapons system before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: Bloodsport
programme.desc: Ninjitsu master Frank Dux journeys to Hong Kong to enter the Kumite, the Olympics of martial arts, and meets a beautiful American reporter. Before long he must face Chong-Li, a vicious Korean master of Tae Kwan Do, in a climactic fight to the finish.

programme.title: Kickboxer
programme.desc: When kickboxing champ Eric Sloane is crippled in the ring by the evil Tong Po, Eric's younger brother, Kurt, seeks vengeance.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Providence, Rhode Island, para visitar DownCity, un restaurante con un avance detenido por un propietario obstinado y de mal genio. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Bridgeport, Connecticut, el chef Ramsay visita el Café Tavolini. Dos propietarios indiferentes observan cómo su restaurante se va a la ruina . Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Sherman Oaks, California, para rescatar a un restaurante francés del peligro mientras los dueños, hermano y hermana, se pelean por el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Durante su visita a Los Ángeles, el chef Ramsay se detiene en Capri. Este restaurante italiano está sucio, sirve comida terrible y está desordenado, todo gracias a un par de gemelos muy flojos.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Recetas de Maíz Venezolano
programme.desc: El venezolano Juan Pablo González muestra la versatilidad del maíz y prepara platos dulces y salados con este ingrediente tradicional.

programme.title: Cocina latina: El Pan Nacional de Venezuela
programme.desc: El cocinero apasionado Juan Pablo González nos presenta la arepa, una especialidad venezolana, y muestra cuatro rellenos diferentes y deliciosos.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Recetas de Plátano
programme.desc: El plátano tiene una dulce reputación, pero el anfitrión venezolano Juan Pablo González muestra que el primo de la banana también tiene un lado sabroso.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Recetas Tradicionales Venezolanas
programme.desc: Juan Pablo González nos ofrece una muestra de la cocina casera venezolana con recetas tradicionales, desde una sopa de calabaza reconfortante y saludable hasta un flan dulce de maracuyá.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Cena, Estilo Venezolano
programme.desc: El anfitrión Juan Pablo González nos muestra cómo impresionar a los invitados con una deliciosa comida venezolana de cuatro platos.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Tapas Españolas
programme.desc: ¿Cena por la noche con amigos? Las tapas los sacarán de apuros y el chef español Luis “Tigretón” León nos muestra cuatro platos tradicionales deliciosos.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: En el paraíso de St. Martin, Tony come una saludable comida rastafari con un luchador por la libertad, ayuda a preparar la comida, descubre la comida que no está disponible en los supermercados de Estados Unidos y se relaja en un bar de la playa.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: En New Orleans, Louisiana, Tony atrapa un caimán Bayou, se refresca con helado mundialmente famoso, tiene problemas con la ley, come jambalaya con un chef bailarín y se relaja con un poco de jazz local.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Conocida como la capital de la felicidad de Brasil, Salvador da Bahía ofrece una variedad de mercados. Aquí, Tony participa en una ceremonia tradicional local y experimenta los talentos culinarios del famoso artista de la cocina bahiana: el chef Dada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: ¿Qué es un carioca? Los nativos son adorables bribones que encuentran formas de evitar el trabajo, prefiriendo la playa, coqueteando, frecuentando restaurantes y bares. Tony, bajo la tutela de un carioca ejemplar, prueba el estilo de vida.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Únete a Tony en su búsqueda del bar perfecto en Nueva York. Descubra la composición química correcta de las bebidas, las alegrías de los bares de mala muerte y la necesidad de aperitivos a altas horas de la noche.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony viaja a la capital del cinturón de cereales de Minneapolis, Minnesota, para experimentar de primera mano el conflicto entre los operadores creativos independientes y las franquicias genéricas.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Casa Roma en Lancaster, California. Aunque su barra está repleta, el comedor de Casa Roma está vacío.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Mojito's, un restaurante cubano en Brooklyn. Los dueños compraron el restaurante como recién casados, pero ahora tienen siete años de un matrimonio y un negocio que se desmorona.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Ridgewood, Nueva Jersey, para rejuvenecer a Bazzini, un restaurante italiano obstaculizado por un servicio lento y un personal de cocina mediocre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Nueva Jersey, el chef Ramsay visita Flamango's, un restaurante obsoleto que necesita ayuda.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Flu-like symptoms of a mother and her children prove to be something more serious: thallium poisoning. After the mother's death, investigators turn their attention to finding the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The doctors at the hospital couldn't determine the cause of Bobby Curley's hallucinations and intense pain. They treated it as a neurological disorder but his condition deteriorated. He was being poisoned.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, more than a dozen children in Seattle, Washington, were fighting for their lives. Each one of them had contracted a serious unknown illness. After one died, investigators knew the clock was ticking.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, the body of Colorado real estate developer Alan Helmick was found by his wife, Miriam, who then became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a discarded sleeping bag containing bloody sneakers and a purse, which eventually leads to the body of a young woman. A mark found on the victim's body enables police to track the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: By using techniques she saw on forensic science TV shows, a mother determines who was responsible for the accident that permanently injured her 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine motorcade for the Queen of England. But on the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the series premiere of "Forensic Files", the longest-running true crime series in history, a Connecticut flight attendant goes missing. Police suspect her husband is guilty of murder, but can they prove it?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment. Petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)

programme.title: Power Rangers: Zeo
programme.desc: Falling asleep while watching a monster movie, Adam envisions his fellow Rangers as hideous monsters.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Ronny runs into a stubborn obstacle named Will while trying to throw a Halloween party. When she is captured to power Moltor and the Fearcats's latest weapon, can Will steal her back?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Norg and Will strike a strange alliance in their attempt to find the Fearcats' secret hideout. The equally strange alliance between Moltor, Mig and Benglo appears to be leading to the defeat of the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy faces some real Halloween monsters after he's kidnapped by Goldar.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita's Frankenstein monster crashes the Power Rangers' Halloween costume party.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly is a contestant with a chance to win a car on a tacky horror comedy game show called Trick or Treat. Her opponent is none other than Skull.

programme.desc: An encounter with a mutated lunar bat leaves Carlos with an aversion to sunlight, and a powerful thirst—for blood!

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: Doce chefs compiten para impresionar a Gordon Ramsay. Ellos trabajan para abrir un renombrado restaurante en Los Ángeles. Ahí se descubre la próxima estrella culinaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de apenas sobrevivir la noche de apertura del restaurante Hell's Kitchen, los concursantes se preparan para su segundo servicio de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Los chefs se preparan para su tercer servicio de cena, pero la presión de Hell's Kitchen es demasiado para un concursante.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: Los concursantes intentan recrear los platos característicos de Gordon para un público exigente de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: Las tensiones surgen en la cocina durante la noche italiana. En el restaurante hay un equipo que quiere ganar jugando sucio.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: En la primera mitad de este especial de dos horas, el chef Ramsay revela el último giro: cada equipo creará su propio menú que consta de tres aperitivos, platos principales y postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día siete
programme.desc: En la parte final de este especial de dos horas, los cinco concursantes restantes descubren que ya no compiten como equipos, sino como individuos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Los cuatro chefs restantes reciben quince minutos y una bandeja con sobras para crear una comida que el chef Ramsay considera servible.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay ordena a los tres concursantes restantes que sirvan una cena completa. ¿Quién creará el mejor plato y quién será enviado a casa sin postre?

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los dos finalistas, con la ayuda de los chefs eliminados, compiten en una simulación que pone a prueba sus habilidades para administrar un restaurante.

programme.desc: When Ricky makes a little money by selling his car, he forgets to tell his New York neighbors who drove out with him to Hollywood that he will buy their return train tickets.

programme.desc: Lucy, unaccustomed to train travel, is sure her trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance. When she hears that a jewel thief is on board, she sees herself as the possible heroine of the situation despite Ricky's admonitions to leave.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: On their return from Hollywood, Lucy has her hands full with Ricky when he is hailed as a major celebrity. The Ricardos' neighbors join for a grand homecoming celebration and block party in Ricky's honor when the Ricardos and Mertze return together.

programme.desc: Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After stealing the remaining contestant’s powers, Chen only needs Lloyd’s power to complete the spell and knowing his daughter has feelings for Kai, Chen tries to enlist the Fire Ninja by promising to share secrets about his parents.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen has failed to bring the return of the Serpentine War but Clouse reveals there’s another way – his daughter has the ability to absorb the power of every fighter she comes across, so she can complete the ceremony.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja reunite with Wu and turn to the aid of a shrunken Pythor in order to figure out how to defeat the unstoppable Anacondrai.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja and fighters discover there’s a strategic location called The Corridor of Elders where they can make their last stand against Chen’s Anacondrai army... but even with the new Destiny Bounty, their forces still aren’t strong enough.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission…

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja race back to the Monastery of Spinjitzu. This is the last stand. The final battle against the Oni is now. Will their joined Spinjitzu powers defeat the Oni for good, or tear apart Ninjago itself?

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As NINJAGO City rebuilds, Faith arrives with a dire warning: the Oni have returned and are destroying the realms, one by one. NINJAGO must prepare, and Lloyd must face the possibility that to defeat this foe, he may need the help of another enemy.

programme.title: Ninjago - Secrets of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Having freed Lord Garmadon from Kryptarium Prison, the ninjas are beset by doubts, particularly about Lloyd. Lord Garmadon and Lloyd journey into the cloud of darkness to stop the Oni's invasion.

programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Days of Rage: The Rolling Stones' Road to Altamont
programme.desc: As the dream of peace and love was shattered in the late 1960s amidst riots, assassinations and war, The Rolling Stones became a defiant voice in this turbulent era, which came to a shocking end at the Altamont festival.

programme.title: Rolling Stone: Life And Death Of Brian Jones
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: Exploring the rise of Brian Jones and the Rolling Stones as well as the untimely death of Jones; Garcia paints an interesting and revealing picture of doomed pop star.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Rock Royalty
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones are arguably one of the biggest rock and roll bands of our time, influencing society and music in ways that will never be forgotten.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Sweet Summer Sun - Hyde Park Live
programme.desc: This live concert film showcases The Rolling Stones' triumphant return to Hyde Park, London. Featuring performances from Mick Jagger himself.

programme.title: The Story of the Rolling Stones
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones are one of the greatest and most influential rock bands of our time having sold in excess of 200 million records worldwide. This fascinating programme tells the story of the early days of the band and how they became The Stones.

programme.title: Mick & Keith
programme.desc: Mick Jagger and Keith Richards often considered as pioneers of rock music genre. Without their unique contribution to music, the contemporary landscape would be very different and it is this originality which has set them apart.

programme.title: Mick Jagger: A Knight to Remember
programme.desc: There has never been a rock and roll star quite like Mick Jagger. He is the voice of a generation. He is a successful musician, artist, actor, movie producer and business man. Relive the life and career of the face of the Rolling Stones.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Rock Royalty
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones are arguably one of the biggest rock and roll bands of our time, influencing society and music in ways that will never be forgotten.

programme.title: Tom Petty: Fallin' Free
programme.desc: Tom Petty was one of the most successful rockers of his generation; his unique blend of country, blues, rock, and psychedelia earned him and his bands a cult following from around the world, but his life wasn’t without suffering.

programme.desc: Safaree says goodbye to Hollywood and makes one last play for Nikki Baby. Teairra returns from rehab with a new perspective. A confrontation rocks Fizz's B2K reunion. Brooke and Bridget transform the showcase. Hazel comes for Ray J.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Masika and Alexis Skyy air out all of their dirty laundry. Moniece and Hazel-E address social media beefs. Ray J and Princess share their frustrations with trying to have a baby. And things get real ugly when Zell and Misster Ray come face to face.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: The conclusion of Zell Swag and Misster Ray's blow up. Plus, will Marcus take the ring out of his pocket for Brooke? Bridget and Booby discuss the kiss in Catalina. And Keyshia Cole takes the stage for a special performance.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: K. Michelle returns to Hollywood, and she already has a score to settle with Lyrica. Moniece's bad behavior catches up to her. Scandal threatens Ray J's marriage to Princess. Teairra hits the town for the first time since rehab.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: A1 confronts Lyrica about Kimberly's allegations. A raging family feud threatens Ray J. and Princess' gender reveal party. Marcus blindsides Brooke with an unwelcoming surprise. Kimberly comes face-to-face with a ghost from her past.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Mayhem erupts at Kimberly's concert. A1 and Lyrica's marital issues ignite an all-out war between their moms. Ray J.'s meet-up with Safaree yields a shocking revelation. Brooke confronts a medical crisis.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: A1 and Lyrica's marriage reaches a tipping point. Teairra's new man disapproves of her friendship with Nikki Baby. A discovery about Fizz sends Moniece into a tailspin. Roccstar makes a move on Apple Watts.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Lyrica betrays A1 when she finds comfort in an old friend. Paris and Nikki Baby unearth shocking intel about Teairra's man. Brooke goes for broke to win back Marcus. Chaos breaks out at Donatella's showcase.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Lyrica drops a game-changing bomb on A1 and his family. Paris exposes another Akbar deception. Kimberly goes under the knife. Apple struggles to bond with her father. Roccstar gets in business with a unique mother-daughter duo.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: A1 and Lyrica host a dinner that goes all the way left. Teairra discovers the shocking truth about Akbar. Ray J. tries to get Safaree to come clean. Brooke ambushes Marcus. Roccstar's collab with Amber gets a messy unveiling.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: A scandal shakes Hollywood, with Teairra at the epicenter. Ray J. hits A1 with even more shocking intel. Moniece gives Jay Will advice that blows up in his face.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Teairra takes legal action against Akbar, testing her friendships with Nikki Baby and Paris. Kimberly launches her own investigation. Moniece dramatically collapses. Shun sees potential in Apple. Jay Will and La'Britney turn on one another.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Pestered by Fujiko, Lupin has to steal a golden bed that was originally made by Louis XIV for Josephine. He makes a plan with Jigen and Goemon, but the owner of the bed, Morgan, is a formidable opponent who has WWII military experience.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Heike Clan and Minamoto Clan once battled on Devil's Head Island at the inland sea of Seto; Fujiko and Lupin go there to find out about the details behind the legend of the battle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vivian dreams of becoming a star some day, but her auditions are a bust. She thinks of using Lupin to become famous; she makes Lupin engage in thievery, and informs reporters to be at the site to catch him in the act.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Louis XIV and Marie Antoinette's Hope Diamond has brought much misfortune on its possessors. The diamond is now safeguarded by a maximum security device. Fujiko provokes Lupin to steal that diamond.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew go to a hot spring. Lupin and Jigen relax while Goemon trains at the cliffs. A girl manifests to Goemon and captures Goemon's heart. However, the girl is seeking the secret of his sword, for her swordsmith grandfather…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has to battle a hitman called Tiger. Lupin tries to dodge him, but Tiger is one step ahead of him. Lupin keeps trying to escape him but Tiger is relentless; he has a way of disappearing and appearing at will.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends go to have fun at the horse race track, but winning isn't as easy as stealing. Lupin notices two people who are winning big money hand over fist, and gets suspicious.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Catherine rescues Lupin and Jigen, who are pursued by Zenigata as usual. She's an old acquaintance of Jigen's, and provokes Jigen to steal a 140-karat diamond from her own mansion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Wolf and Rose are a cool hitmen duo with the ambition of rising to the top of the hitman business by killing Lupin. They capture Goemon and torture him to confess about Lupin's weaknesses. Lupin learns that Goemon is in danger.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The chief of the police department accused of mismanagement on Lupin's release, hit the prime minister out of anger and was dismissed. Zenigata thinks that Lupin is the only arrest to avenge the chief's death, and starts an operation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The painting "The First Supper" hides clues to an heirloom that Christ received from Virgin Mary. This painting has been kept by the clan of Judah for generations, and a woman named Nova knows where the painting is hidden.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Mona Lisa never leaves the Louvre Museum. Arsène Lupin tried unsuccessfully to steal her and Lupin III wants her for his collection, however, and fireworks ignite between him and Zenigata in charge of security.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Lupin is after is the Golden Treasure Ship at Mount Horai. It's said that the Seven Lucky Gods conferred this treasure, which is shown in public only once a year when the New Year's bell rings at the belfry of Kohoji Temple.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Lupin is tossed to and fro by Fujiko. But a man named Buckingham comes to him and sells him "disguise chewing gum" for 50,000 dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The island of Rabaul has many remains of Japanese casualties of the Pacific War. It's said that Captain Cook's secret treasure is hidden there, worth 1-billion pounds. Lupin and gang are after this treasure but they get attacked!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and gang break into the Bank of Stockholm but as usual, Fujiko tries to take the money all for herself. Lupin goes after her but she gets injured in an avalanche. She confesses to Lupin about the location of her most precious treasure…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends search a month for the pirate Kid's treasure, but they are thwarted by an underground organization called the Red Ghost. Knowing something is afoot, Lupin sends Fujiko and Goemon to investigate.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds a piece of paper in a silk hat, an heirloom of Arsène Lupin. It's information regarding an opal statue of Venus, and since Lupin figures its ownership is his birthright, he heads to Gregoire's castle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata acquires a pie-throwing gun, and is ordered to capture Lupin. Meanwhile, Lupin and Fujiko are discussing Napoleon's treasures. It's said that the key to solving the mystery of their whereabouts lies in a scarf made by Napoleon's assistant…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The young girl Francoise lives near Lupin; she watches Lupin and Fujiko talking, and falls for him. But her father scolds her and tells her to stay away from thieves, but Francoise devises a plan to approach Lupin anyway…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Professor Pancho has devoted his life to solving the problem of food supply. Lupin decides to help them out and invents a rocket that flies on corn fuel, thinking that maybe he and Fujiko will take a trip to the moon…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is blackmailed; Fujiko has been kidnapped, and for ransom he must steal a jeweled crown worth 100 million dollars. Lupin and friends head to the museum where their objective lies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lady Black and Fujiko have a bet. Whoever kills Lupin will get the loser's entire jewelry collection. Lady Black lures Lupin using Fujiko so she could kill him, but why is she so passionate about wanting him dead?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Boss Largo wants Lupin dead; Lupin had just stolen a bundle of the boss's casino profits. But no run of the mill hitman would suffice to wack Lupin. But Largo sees that Lupin is suffering from a toothache, and gets an idea.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin reads the morning paper, which says that Lupin stole a 100-karat diamond that was being used in a musical. He knows he didn't do it, so he asks Fujiko and others, but they too have no idea what it's all about.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The nation of Janaica is troubled with coup d'etats and revolutions, but Lupin, discovering that the president's mansion houses the missing painting "Nude Venus," decides to go scope the joint with Jigen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The master of surrealism, Monsieur Daré had spent three years working on his masterpiece, but news is out that the great object of art got stolen.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: At the 2000 All-Star Game, Derek Jeter and Chipper Jones both go 3-for-3. The American League scores three insurance runs in the top of the 9th inning to secure their 6-3 victory over the National League.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/18/77: With one game away from a World Series win, "Mr. October" Reggie Jackson knocks three homers against three different Dodgers pitchers and Mike Torrez pitches a complete game. The Yankees win 8-4 and take home a championship.

programme.title: All-Star Highlights
programme.desc: Check out highlights from the 1983 MLB All-Star Game where the American League dominated the National League. Fred Lynn and Jim Rice hit home runs and Lynn won MVP recording four RBIs in a 13-3 win.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: In his 19th and final All-Star Game, Cal Ripken Jr. hits a home run to lead the American League to a 4-1 victory over the National League. The 2001 All-Star Game was also the final game for Padres right fielder Tony Gwynn.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: Ichiro Suzuki makes history in 2007 by hitting the first ever inside-the-park home run during an All-Star Game. He was rewarded MVP for going 3-for-3 at the plate and collecting two RBIs in an American League victory, 5-4.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The 2008 MLB All-Star Game at Yankee Stadium was marked as the longest All-Star Game in history. It ended after 4 hours and 50 minutes in the 15th inning on a walk-of sacrifice fly from Michael Young.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: Greedy sailors capture a giant lizard off the coast of Ireland and sell it to a London circus. Then its mother shows up.

programme.title: MST3K: Viking Women And The Sea Serpent
programme.desc: The crew watches an educational short about the wonders a home economics major can do for young women in The Home Economics Story (1951). In The Saga of the Viking Women Sea Serpent (1957), lonely Viking women set sail to rescue a group of enslaved men.

programme.title: MST3K: Beyond Atlantis
programme.desc: A new test subject arrives on the Simulator of Love, and her crew watches BEYOND ATLANTIS (1973).

programme.title: MST3K: Viking Women And The Sea Serpent
programme.desc: The crew watches an educational short about the wonders a home economics major can do for young women in The Home Economics Story (1951). In The Saga of the Viking Women Sea Serpent (1957), lonely Viking women set sail to rescue a group of enslaved men.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: The second installment of the undersea adventure to Atlantis.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A scientist and a reporter discover the lost city of Atlantis, a technologically advanced society.

programme.title: MST3K: The Horror Of Party Beach
programme.desc: Pearl and Observer are in Ancient Rome pretending to be gods as Mike and the 'bots watch The Horror of Party Beach (1964).

programme.title: MST3K: The Magic Voyage Of Sinbad (Sadko)
programme.desc: An adventurer sets sail in search of the bird of happiness in Sadko (1953).

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Swamp Diamonds
programme.desc: An undercover police woman infiltrates a group of hardened female criminals who plan to break out of prison and retrieve diamonds from a swamp.

programme.title: Are You The One?

programme.title: Are You The One?

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: The singles match shocking headlines to their housemates, Jenna explores her feelings for Amber while getting to know Jasmine, and another couple steps into the Truth Booth.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Esteban está de mal humor y nadie entiende por qué, su amistad con Fernando pende de un hilo y eso genera tensión en el grupo. Mientras tanto de Italia le llega una sorpresa enorme a Abraham.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock takes the case of Ken Wilson, convicted of murdering his wife, whose body was never found. Recently released from prison after seven years, Wilson sets out to find his missing wife but gets arrested again.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: After achieving success in her younger years, brilliant septuagenarian Madeline Matlock uses her unassuming demeanor to make her way into a position at a prestigious law firm, Jacobson Moore.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: A time capsule rolls into the shop in the form of a 1983 Silverado with exactly 69.2 miles on it; the owner recently passed away, and his daughter wants to finish turning his truck into a modern muscle car under the hood.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: Ekstensive needs a new shop truck, Bill and the guys go sky-high with a lifted '21 F-450 King Ranch capable of hauling over 20,000 pounds; with most of the '46 Ford Coupe body beyond repair, the team has no choice but to build from the ground up.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Algunas personas creen que los fantasmas son espíritus humanos que deben lidiar con asuntos aún pendientes y que quizás puedan necesitar la ayuda de los vivos con el fin de encontrar la paz entre los muertos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los investigadores paranormales buscan comprender lo sobrenatural y, con frecuencia, utilizan su conocimiento para ayudar a los demás. Pero ¿qué ocurre con estos expertos cuando el objeto de sus estudios se pone contra ellos?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando las personas inocentes se ven atacadas por entidades provenientes del reino sobrenatural, ponen su confianza en manos de investigadores paranormales para que estos los protejan de lo desconocido.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Springfield, estado de Illinois, el Lake Club es un monumento a una época pasada: un salón de baile donde multitud de personas alguna vez prosperaron, acompañados de los sonidos del jazz clásico.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La ciencia moderna nos afirma que, en el nivel más simple, el mundo material no es más que energía y que todos estamos conectados de forma física con el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los sueños recurrentes constituyen la manera en la que nuestra mente lidia con los problemas que debemos resolver. Pero ¿qué ocurre cuando la vida comienza a imitar los miedos más temibles del subconsciente?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La fuerza de lo diabólico radica en el poder del engaño. De formas muy sutiles, destruye los lazos familiares y los de la amistad, desvirtúa las creencias de los creyentes y toma posesión de los vivos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Todos tenemos secretos. Algunos de nosotros les ocultamos cosas a nuestros amigos para evitar la vergüenza. Otros, se las ocultamos a nuestros seres queridos porque tenemos el temor de que estropeen la imagen que tienen de nosotros.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ayudar a los amigos a sobrellevar los tiempos difíciles puede ser agotador, en especial cuando esa dificultad tiene que ver con una enfermedad que pone en peligro la vida.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Abril James siempre había soñado con renovar una casa victoriana. Cuando ella y su prometido Matt compran una casa histórica en Salt Lake City, estado de Utah.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La familia Fahey ha vivido en la misma casa en la ciudad de Galway, Irlanda, durante más de treinta años. Martha Fahey creció allí y ahora se prepara para criar a su hija en el mismo ambiente, con la ayuda de sus padres.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La infancia debería ser una etapa de descubrimiento lúdico y de regocijo inocente. Pero ¿qué sucede cuando las realidades del reino paranormal traspasan sus barreras y despiertan el mal verdadero?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La fe es una fuerza poderosa. Puede proporcionar fuerza a los débiles, puede calmar los mares más tempestuosos. Pero, para la mayoría de las personas, la fe brinda respuestas que pueden ayudar a darle sentido a un mundo caótico.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Deb y Tony acaban de comenzar su vida juntos. Con su primer hijo en camino, la pareja trabajadora se muda a una pintoresca casa en Atchison, en el estado de Kansas, con muchas esperanzas para el futuro.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Viaje Cicladas del norte, donde las callejuelas cuidadosamente pavimentadas, los molinos de viento, los palomares, los olivares y las playas están bañados por la luz del sol, lo que lo convierte en un destino de ensueño.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: La buena comunicación es una de las estrategias más versátiles e importantes para la supervivencia tanto en animales solitarios como en animales sociales.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: El delta del Okavango, un enorme oasis de color esmeralda en el calor abrasador del desierto de Kalahari, se alimenta del río Okavango, en un ciclo perpetuo de humedad y sequía.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Desde su época de adversarios peligrosos hasta cazadores colonialistas, hasta los desafíos actuales y considerables de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos emprende la educación de control de esfínteres, y su padre le enseña a usar la pelela. Separan a Fily y Lili por sus constantes peleas, pero pronto se extrañan.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy ingenia un escape para fugarse en una guardería. Tommy acude al doctor para darse una vacuna, él y otro bebé tratan de escaparse.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y Carlitos van a un nuevo parque donde todos los niños le tienen miedo a un chico malo. Tommy y Carlitos descubren que hay un país del otro lado de un espejo y cruzan en busca de una buena aventura.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica se enamora de un niño nuevo de cuatro años que tiene una campera de cuero y monta un triciclo de ruedas grandes. Mientras se dirigen a la heladería, Hugo y Julio se desvían hacia la cancha de golf donde jugaban cuando eran niños.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo sufre de amnesia temporal y empieza a actuar como un bebé. Cuando los Pickles deciden hacer una venta de garage, los Rugrats ayudan reuniendo las cosas de los adultos. Cuando los adultos se dan cuenta, ya es muy tarde y la casa está vacía.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo prueba un juguete nuevo y provoca un apagón en toda la ciudad. Tommy y Carlitos confunden la máquina del cajero automático con una máquina de caramelos y casi destruyen el banco.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica le explica a Tommy que todos los padres regalan a sus hijos a otros padres en las reuniones familiares. Hugo y Didi dejan a Tommy y Carlitos al cuidado del abuelo y los niños se preparan para una excitante noche de películas y helado.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Buscando un recuerdo para Firulais en un viaje, Tommy dirige a los Rugrats en una expedición para obtener un hueso. Carlitos cree que los animales son felices en el agua. Cuando le regalan unos peces, emprende la misión de llevarlos de vuelta al mar.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats encuentran una pequeña lagartija y creen que es el bebé de Reptar, el personaje dinosaurio que adoran. Cuando un juego de adivinanzas se pone demasiado intenso, los Pickles y los DeVilles no se hablan más entre ellos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de ver un programa de televisión de un antiguo superhéroe, los Rugrats convencen a Carlitos que él se puede convertir en superhéroe si se pone una capa violeta. Didi contrata a un peluquero de perros para que bañe a Firulais.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de ver una película, Tommy y Carlitos creen que su Tía Miriam es una hormiga gigante. Inspirados por una película de ciencia ficción, los Rugrats deciden usar un rayo vago para convertirse en miniaturas y entrar en el estómago de Carlitos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi conoce al famoso experto en cuidado de niños, el Dr. Lipschitz, durante una firma de libros, y lo invita a cenar a su casa. Los Rugrats fantasean en cómo sería ser adultos, pero luego deciden que es mejor ser bebés.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de escuchar una historia del Abuelo, Tommy sueña con que los extraterrestres lo llevan adentro de una nave espacial. Cuando el Abuelo pierde a Tommy, decide usar sus técnicas de investigador de los años '30 para encontrarlo.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando un juego de escondidas se pone extraño, Carlitos pierde sus lentes y el mundo le parece como una pesadilla borrosa. Un zorrino moja a Carlitos y él se pone más triste que nunca, mientras los padres tratan de quitarle el horrible olor.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando a Tommy le sacan su osito de peluche preferido, él decide tomar el consejo de Angélica y empieza a portarse mal. Angélica recibe un juego de magia como regalo. Ella y los Rugrats se sorprenden cuando Angélica hace desaparecer a Lili.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Una nueva familia se muda frente de la casa de Tommy y él inmediatamente se hace amigo de su nueva vecina de tres años, Susie. Hugo le compra a Tommy un juego para armar, pero le resulta complicado construirlo y los bebés se entretienen con la caja.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de que Angélica les cuenta una historia de terror, Tommy y Carlitos comienzan a tener miedo de irse por el desagüe de la bañera. Cuando el hermano de Didi, Ben, se casa, Tommy y Carlitos se obsesionan con el enorme pastel de varios pisos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y Carlitos pierden la muñeca favorita de Angélica, Cynthia, sin querer y tienen que decidir si contarle o no la mala noticia a Angélica. Carlitos tiene un amigo imaginario que se llama Barney, que nadie puede ver o escuchar, solamente Carlos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats están fascinados con un camión de basura que viene todas las semanas. Ellos piensan que es un monstruo que se llama Hubert. Los Rugrats ven un programa de televisión sobre un perro que habla, y se convencen de que Firulais los rechaza.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos siente mucho miedo de tirarse por el tobogán del parque. Tommy, Susie, Fili y Liliana lo ayudan a vencer el miedo. Los Rugrats van a una piscina pública para empezar sus clases de natación y están convencidos de que es un inodoro gigante.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras el Abuelo compite en un campeonato de bolos, los Rugrats se van a explorar y descubren que el contrincante del Abuelo hace trampa. Después que Julio la castiga, Angélica decide dejar su casa e irse a la de Tommy.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi concursa en un juego peligroso de televisión en donde tiene que enfrentar sus propios miedos. Boris y Minka cuidan a Tommy y Angélica por un fin de semana, pero no se acuerdan bien de sus técnicas de cuidar a niños.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica salva a Carlitos de ser atropellado y decide que él sea su esclavo para siempre. Los bebés admiran a Susie porque ella siempre los defiende de Angélica, pero ésta le apuesta a Susie que puede hacer cualquier cosa mejor que ella.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica se entera del Hada de los Dientes, y prepara un plan para hacerse rica en poco tiempo con los dientes de Carlitos. El Abuelo les lee un cuento de Aladino y su lámpara mágica y la casa se convierte en un juego de fantasía.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats llevan acabo el sabotaje de una cena. Fili y Lili quieren ser diferentes.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: A Carlitos le van a cortar el pelo por primera vez, y él le tiene miedo a los cortes de cabello, por lo que los Rugrats y Carlos deciden ayudarlo a superar su miedo. Angélica y Susie van al mismo campamento y Angélica descubre que estaba equivocada.

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?
programme.desc: An educator aims to prove herself to her students. But when she's stumped in 3rd grade, she considers breaking all school rules and cheating off the class!

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?
programme.desc: This law enforcement officer is all about following the rules until he's caught without an answer! Will he cheat to move up the money ladder?

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Mindy wants Michael to step up to the plate, be a father, and help support his child. His new girlfriend Tanya also wants Michael to be involved in his child's life, but after hearing the lie detector results, she too might question her man.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Tacarra has been with Jaray for 5 years and raising two children together. But now she feels the passion has died and his coldness towards her has driven her crazy, and now she questions her marriage, and Jaray's honesty.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Miranda says that her fiancée Charlie is guilty of cheating and taking drugs. Has he been cheating with Lisa, Miranda's worst enemy? He says that he stayed a couple of days at Lisa's house to make Miranda jealous! Can this relationship survive?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: When ordinary people need help, Steve Wilkos is ready to answer the call. Watch as Steve helps ordinary people stand up for themselves and fight for what he believes in order to promote justice for all.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Lainie and Justin have 9 month old baby together. Justin hurts Lainie because he thinks she’s cheating. But how will Steve react when he confronts Justin?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Lisa has had all six of her children REMOVED from her home as a result of neglect and abuse which she still tries to justify.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jennifer spent years tracking down her biological mother and when she finally did, her mother's husband, Rodney, drove them apart after she turned him down. Refusing to lose her mother again, she turns to Steve for help!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was hospitalized. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: A mom, addicted to PCP, repeatedly abuses her daughter. She even forced her daughter to lie about her abusive boyfriend just so he could get out of jail.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Beep runs a convenience store and he's fallen in love with the girlfriend of one of the patrons. Next James has been waiting for 5 years to take his revenge on his brother. Then Michelle has a shocking experience with a shocking person!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Roger has been sleeping with his girlfriend's mother and her aunt too. Next Jeff brought the Springer Cam along to help him bust his wife, Dee Dee. Later Brenda is here to tell her lover's wife that she's about to lose her husband!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: A man admits to his wife that he slept with her best friend; a guest is furious with his cousin for telling his girlfriend about his infidelity; a woman wants to know whether her man has been cheating.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Justin says that Ashley's so overbearing and protective that it drove him to cheat on her with her lifelong friend Erica. Then, Tina is here to confront her sister Ruthie for cheating with her man Tony.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Nichelle’s here to stop her cousin Talibah from marrying Tyisha. Nick tells Chelsea that he was born a woman.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Quién es responsable del bienestar del pequeño Noel? Todo el mundo puede negar las acusaciones, pero alguien sabe qué pasó, y Steve va a obtener explicaciones.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kendra tiene la misión de salvarla de su novio tóxico Chris. A los 17 años, Kendra está embarazada de su sexto hijo. Kendra lo ha intentado casi todo, incluso echarlo de su casa, pero no solamente se defendió, sino que también golpeó a Kendra.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sheroya tiene 17 años y se esfuerza por criar a 2 niños mientras sale de fiesta sin parar. Su novio Malcolm suele ser infiel y la maltrata verbalmente. Steve tiene mucho trabajo por delante con esta pareja, pero ¿alguno de ellos despertará?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Everett tocó a la hija de su novia Michelle? Su ex Robert dice que su hija de 7 años lo contó. ¡Everett se someterá a una prueba con el detector de mentiras para desmentirlo! ¡No te pierdas estos resultados impactantes!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Marlo tocó a su hija con Sandra cuando ella tenía 7 años? Ha evitado confrontarla durante casi 10 años, pero hoy, Sandra no se irá hasta que no se sepa la verdad y se haga justicia por su hija.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Steve está celebrando otra reunión de chicas adolescentes para tratar los problemas más importantes a los que se pueden enfrentar todas las adolescentes, incluyendo el uso de drogas, el abuso físico y los agresores en Internet.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sherry fue atacada a los 15 años y se escapó de su casa. Quiere que Steve la ayude a reunirse con su madre. Después, la hija adolescente de Dawn, Cathy, dio a luz recientemente, pero vive asustada por el desempleado e inestable padre del bebé, Nick.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¡Kristy quiere que su madre, Donna, le devuelva su bebé! Donna afirma que se llevó al bebé porque nació con graves discapacidades debido a que Kristy consumió drogas durante el embarazo. ¿Quién está mintiendo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Aeshia ha venido a demostrar a Terrence y a su esposa Lashondra que Terrence es el padre de su hijo, pero Lashondra sabe que se equivoca. Tanto Shaunah como Chris se han convencido de que les son infieles. ¿Quién es el padre?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La relación de dos años de Anastasia y Robert terminó cuando él escuchó rumores de que ella le era infiel. Ella dice que siempre le ha sido fiel, pero Robert no le cree y ahora duda que sea el padre de su bebé recién nacido.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dice que desde que llegó a casa del trabajo y encontró a su hijo de un año con un ojo morado, ha temido que la niñera de sus hijos los lastime. La niñera Cheryl niega las graves acusaciones acerca del niño.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Thornton dice que no puede confiar en su novia infiel Crystal y quiere que se someta al detector de mentiras. Además, Stephanie quiere demostrarle a su marido, Mathew, que no está teniendo sexo con un miembro de su familia.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Deshawn afirma que su ex Lynette abandonó a su hijo de 5 años. Pero ella afirma que él la está alejando de su hijo. Sin embargo, Deshawn se enteró recientemente de que no está en el certificado de nacimiento de su hijo, ¡así que quiere una prueba de ADN!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dio a luz a un niño y cree que Brandon es el padre. Pero Brandon afirma que no supo del niño hasta tres años después y niega ser el padre. Stephanie y su mamá quieren que Brandon se haga cargo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la hacienda Arismendi, Caridad informa a Luis Mario de la visita de Marcela. Luis Mario se desconcentra al ver la presencia de la desconocida, quien justifica su visita en el lugar.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Al haber revelado ante Eduarda su gran secreto acerca de su vinculación con Luis Mario, Mercedes toma la decisión de castigar a su hermana.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Caramelo acude a Fedora para que le dé alojo en la mansión, y le cuenta cómo Octavia hizo para que ella se fuera de la casa de su padre.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Fedora le reclama a Paco el haberse casado con Octavia y el hecho de querer ocultárselo.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Octavia va a la casa donde vive Paola y se encuentra con la sorpresa de que la otra esposa de Pancholón es nada más y nada menos que Caramelo.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Silvia planea que cuando se confirme la desaparición definitiva de Diana, ella le confesará a Maximiliano la verdad que el hijo de Diana es de él.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy le dice a Lissette que Luciano está arruinado, mientras que Margot y Morgana se enteran de la terrible noticia. Luciano le pide a Jeremías que siga el juego de que está en la ruina.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Santiago y Willy planifican ir a la policía para rescatar a Verónica. Mariana va en busca de Lissette para desahogarse con ella, de la tristeza que tiene al ver a Ricardo contra ella y su padre.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Margot advierte a Morgana acerca de Esteban, pero Morgana rechaza el consejo. Teresa le pide a Hilario que consiga un bebé para hacerlo pasar por el hijo que está esperando, pero Hilario se niega.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Verónica y Mariana hablan bajo la vigilancia de Doménica. Aun así puede contarle que está secuestrada y que no puede huir con Santiago. Arturo llega, la lleva a Doménica y la deja en manos de Lucho para que la cuide.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Marcela toma la determinación de informar a Luis Mario de su vinculación con su hermana Mercedes.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio amenaza a Luis Mario de muerte al tener en su poder un arma de punzo penetrante. Mercedes interviene en la situación al pretender proteger a su hijo, Luis Mario, de la amenaza de Patricio.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dressrosa! Luffy and the Straw Hats divide into teams and set about their business on this passionate, enchanting island! But here, in the heart of enemy territory, danger lurks around every corner. Luffy and the others encounter a mysterious blind man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy enters the Corrida Colosseum in order to compete for Ace's Flare-Flare Fruit! But with the mightiest warriors of the New World assembled and standing in his way, the competition will not be easy. The first stage of the competition is a battle royal.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the deadly battle of Block A winds down, all the onlookers in the stadium are shocked to discover the secret identity of the winner! Meanwhile, Luffy's cover may be blown as another voice from the past returns.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy meets an unexpected acquaintance from the past, Bellamy, who seems to be up to no good! Meanwhile, Caesar Handover Team encounters a snag when they learn just how dangerous Green Bit is!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle heats up and the widely despised Bartolomeo takes the ring! But he'll have to contend with both the Prodence Kingdom contingent, and Dressrosa's own local favorite, Bellamy! From up above, Luffy risks having his cover blown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chinjao continues to provoke Luffy, hoping to gain revenge against the grandson of his sworn enemy, Garp! But as the argument continues, Luffy risks having his cover blown, and his identity revealed! Meanwhile, the battle in Block B rages.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Franky try to regroup after Doflamingo's betrayal, hoping that destroying the factory is not yet out of their grasp. Meanwhile Luffy makes a friend in the Colosseum and Usopp ends up thrust into an uncomfortable position!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Sunny is mysteriously deformed by the bizarre powers of Giolla! Can Nami, Chopper, and Brook act in time to save their beloved home? Meanwhile, the battle for Block C continues as Luffy suffers a staggering setback.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After knocking down the Giant, Hajrudin, as payback for what he did to Ucy, Luffy has to deal with Ideo, whose punch has the destructive force of a bomb, while the Funk Brothers show off their bizarre fighting technique.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Chopper, and Brooke keep trying to evade Jora and win back the Sunny even though it's been turned into a piece of art! In the Colosseum, Don Chin Jao finally faces Luffy - whose power will prove greater?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands along against Don Chinjao, and learns about the old grudge he bears against Garp! Meanwhile, Usopp and Robin get swept up in the Tontatta Kingdom's raid against the royal family, and Franky learns the eerie secret of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontatta Kingdom gears up for its all-out assault on the Doflamingo Family, as Usopp and Robin are caught up in the war effort! Meanwhile, Franky arrives the headquarters of the toy movement where he finds Zoro, Nami & the others are cornered by Jora.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao's hatred of Garp and Luffy is finally explained, while his battle against Luffy comes to an end. With tremendous power, one of them is squarely eliminated! But is that really the end of the Colosseum battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the battle with Don Chinjao long behind him, Luffy advances to the final round! Block-D contender Cavendish, however, takes the chance and pounces on Luffy, who is defended by an unlikely ally! The agenda of Colosseum gladiator Rebecca is exposed.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca's deep bonds with the one-legged toy soldier are revealed! Her lineage can be traced to the previous ruler of Dressrosa - and her eternal bond with the damaged toy is linked to the violent overthrow of that regime by none other than Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Rebecca enters the ring for the battle for Block D, the crowd shows its contempt for her heritage - only to be scolded by an unlikely supporter. Meanwhile, the other Straw Hats start to reassemble to deal with the attack on the Sunny.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo recounts for Law the surprising history of the Don Quixote Family, while Nami and the others battle the insane and powerful artist, Giolla! Her ultimate attack renders them incapacitated, and prompts the betrayal of one of their closest allies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law is pinned by Fujitora, and Doflamingo has the upper hand! Only the most cunning of tricks could save Law's plan to hand Caesar over to Nami & the others! Meanwhile, the Sunny falls into danger again, & the battle for Block D heats up in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law must put himself in harm's way to defend the Sunny and the Straw Hats from Doflamingo's all-out assault! With barely enough time to save the crew, plans change and send the Sunny on a new mission -- but will it be able to get underway?

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: The Devil Inside
programme.desc: In 1989 Maria Rossi was diagnosed insane after brutally murdering three people. Twenty years later, her daughter Isabella searches for answers that lead to an exorcism of her mother.

programme.title: The Faculty
programme.desc: A group of small-town high school students discovers their teachers are under the control of mind-controlling alien parasites. From a smart script by Kevin Williamson (SCREAM), and directed by action-expert Robert Rodriguez (FROM DUSK TO DAWN).

programme.title: Oculus
programme.desc: A woman tries to exonerate her brother, who was convicted of murder, by proving that the crime was committed by a supernatural phenomenon.

programme.title: Jennifer's Body
programme.desc: A possessed cheerleader gains an appetite for her male classmates.

programme.title: 30 Days of Night
programme.desc: Josh Hartnett (The Black Dahlia, Pearl Harbor) crosses over to the dark side in this bone-chilling adaptation of the cult-hit graphic novel, brought to the screen in all its demonic glory.

programme.title: 30 Days of Night: Dark Days
programme.desc: Almost a year has passed since Barrow, Alaska’s population was decimated by vampires. Stella, mourning her husband’s murder, has been travelling the world trying to convince others that vampires exist.

programme.title: Crawl
programme.desc: As a hurricane tears through Florida, Haley rushes to find her father, who is injured and trapped in the crawl space of their home. With the storm intensifying and water levels rising, the pair face an even bigger threat lurking below the surface.

programme.title: Supernova
programme.desc: Supernova" chronicles the search and rescue patrol of a deep space medical ship and its six-member crew.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: Enter the world of 1970s TV news, where Ron Burgundy and his loyal Channel 4 News Team are San Diego's #1 rated news source. All is well in their male-dominated world of news until rising star reporter Veronica Corningstone turns it upside down.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Bernie
programme.desc: In small-town Texas, an affable mortician (Jack Black, "School of Rock") strikes up a friendship with a wealthy widow, who soon becomes controlling.

programme.title: School of Rock
programme.desc: Jack Black stars as a guitarist with delusions of grandeur. Kicked out of his band and looking for work, he becomes a substitute teacher and turns his class into rock and rollers.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black is more hilarious than ever as Ignacio, a monastery cook who feeds orphan children by day and by night transforms himself into Nacho Libre, a notorious Luchador in stretchy pants.

programme.title: Tropic Thunder
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Jack Black and Robert Downey Jr. lead an ensemble cast in 'Tropic Thunder,' an action comedy about a group of self-absorbed actors who set out to make the most expensive war film.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Keith Douglas is met with a barrage of bullets as he opens his door. The police are looking to Dr. G for hard evidence to link certain suspects to the murder.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A Washington teen's innocent trip to the store ends in murder.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A Georgia woman's sanctuary turns into a crime scene.
